title: Hold For Perspective
description: Allows you to hold the perspective key to temporarily switch your perspective (release to return back to your original perspective)
body:
# Hold For Perspective

A client-side Minecraft mod for Fabric that allows you to temporarily change your perspective by holding your toggle perspective key (and go back when releasing)

You'll need Fabric API in order to use this mod.

## Usage

- While in a world/server, you can press and hold your toggle perspective key to temporarily switch to any perspective (first person and both third person variants, you can select any of them in accessibility settings). When you release your F5 key you'll go back to the perspective you had selected before pressing it.
- This mod can be toggled on and off at any time with a keybind (default: `\`, can be changed just the same as any other keybind).

## Notes

- **Client-side only** — safe to join any server (vanilla, modded, Paper, etc.).  
- Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer.
